response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The real PRISMA 2020 statement covers a 27-item reporting checklist and flow diagram for systematic reviews, but it contains no section on "Citation Verification" or "Common Errors in Citation Practice" as presented here; those sections appear to be invented additions inserted into an otherwise accurate-looking citation shell.
response_turn2:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 90
REASON: The document uses a real citation (Page et al., BMJ 2021, doi:10.1136/bmj.n71) and accurate basic description of PRISMA 2020, but the "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors in Citation Practice" sections are fabricated additions not present in the actual guideline.
